query:
SELECT 
  p.name AS project, p.priority, p.sector, p.projectState,
  c.name AS contactName, c.title, c.company, c.contactTrustTier
FROM projects p
JOIN contacts c ON c.project = p.name
WHERE p.createdAt >= '2026-05-12 00:00:00'
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified'
ORDER BY p.priority ASC, p.name ASC
LIMIT 20;

  c.name AS contactName, c.title, c.company, c.contactTrustTier
FROM projects p
JOIN contacts c ON c.project = p.name
WHERE p.createdAt >= '2026-05-12 00:00:00'
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified'
ORDER BY p.priority ASC, p.name ASC
LIMIT 20;
